summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both appear structurally intact with no visible signs of damage or debris. The overall scene depicts a well-maintained urban area with a large institutional building and surrounding residential structures, all appearing undamaged and functional. Based on the prior assessments, the scene indicates no functional disruption to the assessed buildings.
